name: Daisy Magnolia
alt_names: デイジー・マグノリア
description: The granddaughter of [Ann Magnolia](https://anilist.co/character/213148/Ann-Magnolia), whom Violet met when she was asked to write letters to by her [mother](https://anilist.co/character/223026/Clara-Magnolia). After Ann's death, she finds an old letter that has been kept in a safe place and traces the achievements of the automatic memoir doll, [Violet Evergarden](https://anilist.co/character/90169/Violet-Evergarden).
